extension.description: EasyMovie helps you pick movies for movie night. Answer a few questions (genre, rating, runtime) and get a curated random selection from your library. Supports movie set awareness, multiple viewing modes, and playlist generation.
extension.news: v1.2.0 (2026-06-20) - Press Info on a movie in Browse Mode to open Kodi's full movie information screen (cast, plot, artwork, and more) - View details in any of the five browse layouts, then back out to keep browsing or start the movie right from there - Movies you play from the info screen are remembered, so resume and in-progress tracking keep working
